generated_oml:
instance ModelChangeSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring changes in SysML and ADL models for version control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ModelChangeDataTransmitted
]

instance PhysicalLiveDataSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing live data streams from the physical asset"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PhysicalLiveDataTransmitted
]

instance ModelChangeDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ModelChangeSensor
]

instance PhysicalLiveDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PhysicalLiveDataSensor
]

instance ModelChangeData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Data representing changes in SysML and ADL models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ModelChangeDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitRepositoryEnabler
]

instance PhysicalLiveData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Live data stream from the physical asset"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PhysicalLiveDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance SysMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model created in SysML (v1.7)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitRepositoryEnabler
]

instance MontiArcModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model created in MontiArc for behavioural automata"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitRepositoryEnabler
]

instance AADLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model created in AADL for component definition"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GitRepositoryEnabler
]

instance SimulinkSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic behaviour verified by simulation in MathWorks Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance GitRepositoryEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Git repository maintains models and code, enabling version control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ConsistencyCheckService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Simulation runner verifies model behaviour against live data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables CrossSimulationService
]

instance ConsistencyCheckService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Consistency checks between SysML requirement diagrams and downstream code, along with automated model-to-code consistency tests"
    DTDFVocab:provides ConsistencyInsight
]

instance CrossSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Cross-simulation validation with live data streams from the physical asset"
    DTDFVocab:provides CrossSimulationInsight
]

instance ConsistencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on whether SysML models are consistent with downstream code"
]

instance CrossSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight on validation results of simulations against live data streams"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin life‑cycle is organised in nested MBSE abstraction layers: 1) Requirements, formalised with SysML requirement diagrams; 2) Functional architecture, captured with SysML activity/parametric diagrams; 3) Logical architecture, expressed in ADL constructs such as MontiArc interfaces, AADL component specifications or SysML connectors; 4) Product/technical layer, represented by source code artefacts (C++/Java) and simulation artefacts (Simulink models).  Transition between layers is managed through traceability links defined in SysML models, while iteration and change‐management follow the RFLP (Requirements‑Functions‑Logics‑Physics), OOSEM, SPES or SMArDT frameworks, which prescribe consistent notation, version control and deliverable review points."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standard compliance is realised through the use of recognised architecture description languages: SysML (the OMG standard for system modelling), AADL, ACME and MontiArc – all of which provide XML‑based interchange formats that support interoperability across modelling tools, simulation environments and code generators."
]
